title: Horse Boat
description: Look at my horse, my horse is amazing! Don't leave your ride behind!
body:
This data pack allows you to put horses (and other larger mobs) into boats.

Normally, you cannot put a mob into a boat if their hitbox is larger than the boat hitbox, as then you can't interact with the boat. This pack solves this issue by creating a new hitbox for the boat that is slightly larger than the mob riding it. I've done my best to make it function as close as possible to vanilla.

**Mobs supported:**

- Horses
- Skeleton Horses
- Zombie Horses
- Camels (if they're not sitting)
- Donkeys
- Mules

---
Also on [Planet Minecraft](https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/horse-boat/)
